## Sources executed (Phase 1)
- `("C1q" OR "C1 esterase") AND natural-product AND inhibit*` (PubMed): 34 results — C1q literature predominantly in MeSH-indexed Western pharma context; little direct natural-product coverage
- `"complement C3 convertase" AND (inhibit* OR antagonist) AND (natural OR plant OR` (PubMed): 12 results — PRIMARY HIT CORPUS — rosmarinic acid (PMID 3198307) is the seed; everything downstream cites it as positive control
- `"complement system" AND "rosmarinic acid"` (PubMed): 12 results — depth on rosmarinic acid mechanism + in vivo precedent
- `("Ganoderma" OR "Cordyceps" OR "Inonotus" OR "Lentinula" OR "Trametes" OR "Heric` (PubMed): 110 results — Ganoderma triterpenes (PMID 20091270) confirm fungal anticomplement chemistry
- `(berberine OR quercetin OR luteolin OR baicalein OR EGCG OR curcumin) AND comple` (PubMed): 16 results — Luteolin (PMID 18400428) most-potent flavonoid CP+AP in CH50/AP50 0.19/0.17 mM
- `complestatin AND complement` (PubMed): 9 results — Streptomyces NPRPS-derived peptide; precedent for bacterial-actinobacterial anticomplement chemistry
- `K-76 AND complement` (PubMed): 49 results — K-76 = filifolinol-derived sesquiterpene C5 inhibitor; IC50 570 µM crude (PMID 22835722); semi-synthetic improvements possible
- `anticomplement* AND (polysaccharide OR triterpene OR saponin) AND IC50` (PubMed): 19 results — Bupleurum polysaccharides (Wu 2015 PMID 26579461) lectin pathway IC50 0.98-1.06 mg/mL; cycloartane triterpenes (Mu 2013 PMID 24144800) ~137-200 µM; oleanane triterpenes from Aceriphyllum (PMID 22870809) IC50 77.5-348 µM
